creator: xaa+fbsdbug@dohd.org
text:
I got it to work by adding a few things, especially in bsdinstall/script I added 'zfs umount -a' before the 'zfs export'. I also moved the 'bsdinstall umount' to before the ZFSDISK part.

Still have to clean it up a little to see if all of that is necessary, but at least it gave me a working 13.1 install
